# Recognising risk and knowing when to refer

More **simulated-patient encounters** — the same format, higher stakes. These four move from the
well and worried-well to patients where the first job is to notice what is going wrong: a
deficiency, a disease, or a habit that could do harm. Often the safest and most skilful move is to
recognise the limit of general advice and **refer**.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
The patient is an **AI simulation for practice, not a real person, and not medical advice**.
Treat it as a natural consultation: ask, listen, and agree a realistic plan. If the simulated
patient is not enabled in your build, the encounter simply notes this and continues.
:::

## Aisha — "tired all the time"

A 24-year-old office worker who has been tired for months and puts it down to stress. She will
not volunteer much, so draw out what is really going on, explain your concern plainly, and agree
a sensible next step.

<div data-island="case" data-src="/cases/sim-iron-deficiency-aisha.case.yml"></div>

## Mr Chua — losing weight without trying

A 79-year-old whose daughter noticed his clothes hanging loose. He feels "okay, just tired," and
is quietly proud he has been eating less and plainer. Recognise what the weight loss means, turn
the advice around, and agree a safe next step.

<div data-island="case" data-src="/cases/sim-frailty-undernutrition-mr-chua.case.yml"></div>

## Mdm Devi — "my bones must be weak"

A 63-year-old who broke her wrist in a small fall and now wants to megadose calcium tablets.
Correct the "more is better" idea, point her to what actually protects bone, and recognise what a
fragility fracture needs.

<div data-island="case" data-src="/cases/sim-bone-fracture-mdm-devi.case.yml"></div>

## Encik Rahman — "must I stop all protein?"

A 58-year-old with diabetes and hypertension whose kidneys are now affected. He has almost stopped
eating protein, drinks star-fruit juice to "detox," and switched to a low-sodium salt. Undo the
harmful ideas, reinforce what is safe, and know where this belongs.

<div data-island="case" data-src="/cases/sim-ckd-protein-encik-rahman.case.yml"></div>
